posts.raw_content:
At this point, there’s practically not a single post where the very first comment you read—the top-voted one—isn't anti-Trump or critical of this administration. Not even on my work computer—where MSN News pops up automatically and where *every* article is anti-Trump—do I see this many negative comments.
I hope you guys are just AI bots or paid shills, because if you’re actually real users from this site, honestly, you should just go to hell and never show your faces around here again.
There isn't a SINGLE thing that satisfies you people—and I’m not just talking about the war; I mean *anything* published regarding Trump.
FUCK YOU

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: We're more Irish than Ireland. 36 Million Americans are of Irish descent, but there are only 5 million in Ireland.

twitter.content:
Fun fact

There are 36 million Americans of Irish descent and only 5 million people currently living in Ireland. 

If your ancestors lived in Ireland in the 1800s, you are 9 times more likely to live in the USA than Ireland.

Happy St. Patrick's Day!
